AT0036.title: Device Wipe Tools
AT0036.description: Device wipe tools completely reset a device to factory settings, clearing all user data, modifying device fingerprint data, and clearing all locally stored data from installed apps. After wiping, the device is theoretically a brand new device.

references.title: 业务安全对抗之黑产工具篇(非常详细)从零基础到精通,收藏这篇就够了...
